## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what changed and why. Link the bead (`ini-…`) or GitHub issue. -->

## Regression test (required for bug fixes)

- [ ] Added a test that fails on `main` and passes with this change
- [ ] N/A — not a bug fix, OR a regression test isn't practical here (explain in summary above)

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] If this is a bug fix, verified the regression test is **new** (not pre-existing)
- [ ] Optionally: reverted the fix locally to confirm the new test fails (trust but verify)
- [ ] `make check` passes
